title: Twixxel's Stalker (port)
description: Adds The Stalker, a Silent Hunter that pursues you when you're not looking.
body:
This is a port from curseforge to modrinth, i did this so modrinth players can enjoy this too, if the original creator of this mod wants me to take it down i will, credits to mr. perkasc to making the original mod.

adds the stalker, it appears and it watches you, waiting for the moment to strike.

ORIGINAL MOD: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/twixxels-


Stalker Heavily inspired by
Twixxel's Stalker series on YouTube. Credits to LCrandom on YouTube for the designs.The Stalker: Something is watching you. The Stalker is a terrifying mysterious entity that lurks in the shadows, 

silently observing its victims. Unlike ordinary mobs, The Stalker cannot move while being directly looked at. 

As long as your eyes are on it, you're safe. But the moment you look away... It begins to move.

Fast.

The Stalker will follow players from a distance, appearing in forests, caves, abandoned structures, and even outside your base at night. 

You'll catch glimpses of it standing motionless between trees or staring through windows. Turn away for even a second, and it may be much closer when you look back.

Twixxel's series on The Stalker: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-J6W9PNH99s" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
